title: JEI Hover Search
description: A simple and convenient Minecraft mod that allows you to quickly search for items in JEI by simply hovering over them and pressing a hotkey.
body:
# JEI Hover Search

A simple and convenient Minecraft mod that allows you to quickly search for items in JEI by simply hovering over them and pressing a hotkey.

Inspired by JEI's hover functionality, this mod adds the ability to instantly search for the item you're currently hovering over, making inventory management and recipe discovery much faster and more intuitive.

## Downloads

[![CurseForge Downloads](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/full_jei-hover-search_downloads.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei-hover-search)
[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/jei-hover-search?logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei-hover-search)

## Usage

1. **Hover** over any item in your inventory, JEI interface, or any GUI
2. **Press the hotkey** (default: `Y` key)  
3. **JEI instantly searches** for that item

The keybinding can be customized in Minecraft's Controls settings under the **"JEI (Hovering with Mouse)"** category.

## Requirements

- **JEI (Just Enough Items)**: Required
- **Architectury API**: Required

## Compatibility

This mod is designed to work seamlessly with JEI and integrates directly into its existing interface without conflicts.

## Issues & Suggestions

Found a bug or have a suggestion? Please report it on the [Issues page](https://github.com/Madgique/jei-hover-search/issues).
